name: Pot hotspot
lore:
Lore of Pot hotspot
                                    


Pot Hotspot embodies an anthropomorphic character generated by artificial intelligence, characterized by a skeletal form that sports a human-like visage. This quirky figure yearns for Wi-Fi connectivity, often depicted with a smartphone displaying the word "Wi-Fi."
This unique creation merges elements of a skeleton, a smartphone, and Wi-Fi connectivity. Its origins trace back to Italian internet culture, where it became a central figure in a popular meme known as Hotspot Memes. The recurring phrase "Hotspot Bro" defines its essence, while the meme features a range of characters that share the underlying theme of hot spots, similar to the Pot Hotspot itself. The fundamental idea behind this meme revolves around expressing a sense of frustration and melancholy when one cannot access a hotspot, particularly when depending on the generosity of others for Wi-Fi.
Interestingly, the original Indonesian description provides extensive details about this phenomenon; however, it illustrates a reluctance to purchase mobile data. Generally speaking, the meme seems to satirize the behavior of relying on others' cellular data, portraying scenarios where individuals plead for hotspot access just to use messaging apps. This highlights the absurdity of connecting to someone else's hotspot, especially when the demand is high and the data usage is substantial.
Description original text
"Pot Hotspot Prot Hotspot" ucap seorang anomali anak kucai yang tidak memiliki kuota kepada teman-temannya. Anomali ini sering disebut ‘Mokondo’ karena tidak mau membeli kuota. Giliran jajan di kantin duitnya ngga habis-habis. Anomali ini juga sangat menyebalkan karena jika diberi hotspot, dia langsung tidak tahu diri seperti mendownload video Youtube, nonton TikTok, dan mendownload data Genshin. Padahal dia cuman bilang "hotspot dong buat buka wa doang"
"Pot Hotspot Prot Hot Spot" is a word for friends without data. This guy is called 'Morcondo', because it never buys data. Even though the money comes out endlessly when you are in the stall. This is also very annoying, but even if you lend the hotspot once, you can use the data quickly. Download YouTube video, watch Tic Talk, and download the original . I said, " I'll see whatsApp only for a while."
